books.title: AI Skills Every IT Professional Needs by 2027
books.subtitle: School of Technology and Computing
books.description: A research-backed guide to the capabilities reshaping IT careers — AI literacy, MLOps, RAG, cybersecurity, cloud, governance — and how to build them.
books.file: ebooks/AI Skills Every IT Professional Needs by 2027.pdf

books.title: AI on the Front Line
books.subtitle: Seattle · Greater Seattle · Washington State
books.description: A field guide for Seattle-area police, fire & EMS — covering local AI use, prosecutorial limits, statewide rules, wildfire cameras, and 911 — plus the policies catching up.

books.title: From Anxiety to Confidence
books.subtitle: School of Technology and Computing
books.description: A realistic, research-backed guide for career changers starting a tech degree — imposter syndrome, adult learners, learning techniques that work, and building your support network.
